dataformat.name: mimeMultipart
dataformat.title: MIME Multipart
dataformat.description: Marshal Camel messages with attachments into MIME-Multipart messages and back
dataformat.label: dataformat,transformation

multipartSubType.description: Specify the subtype of the MIME Multipart.

multipartWithoutAttachment.description: Whether a message without attachment is also marshaled into a MIME Multipart (with only one body part).

headersInline.description: Whether the MIME-Multipart headers are part of the message body (true) or are set as Camel headers (false).

includeHeaders.description: A regex that defines which Camel headers are also included as MIME headers into the MIME multipart. This only works if headersInline is set to true.

binaryContent.description: Whether the content of binary parts in the MIME multipart is binary (true) or Base-64 encoded (false).
